problems.title: Numpy Array Creation
problems.description: Create an array using 'array()' with elements 2, 4, 6, 8. Expected output: [2 4 6 8]
problems.prompt: Create an array using 'array()' with elements 2, 4, 6, 8. Expected output: [2 4 6 8]
problems.starter_code:
from numpy import *

def main(input_1):
    # Write your solution here.
    pass

if __name__ == "__main__":
    input_1 = [2, 4, 6, 8]
    main(input_1)
problems.solution:
from numpy import *

def main(input_1):
    arr = array(input_1)
    print(arr)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    input_1 = [2, 4, 6, 8]
    main(input_1)

from numpy import *

def main(input_1, input_2, input_3):
    arr = linspace(input_1, input_2, input_3)
    print(arr)

    input_1 = 0

    input_2 = 4

    input_3 = 5
    main(input_1, input_2, input_3)
